hypothesis: Incorporating active-site motif (e.g., atop/bridge/hollow) and the mean first-shell adsorbate–metal distance as additional conditioning inputs into CompGen will increase the fraction of generated HEA two-shell compositions whose DFT-relaxed adsorption energies fall within ±0.1 eV of the target energy by at least 30% relative to the current model conditioned only on adsorbate identity, adsorption energy, and element list.
